disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected - KATU
updates.body_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected KATU
updates.summary_zh: 研究发现美国西北部啮齿动物汉坦病毒携带率高于预期。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒网络研讨会，聚焦国际海运环境。

updates.title_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - NPR
updates.body_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak NPR
updates.summary_zh: 美国两名游客因邮轮汉坦病毒爆发被强制隔离。

updates.title_en: US curbs on travelers exposed to deadly viruses may infringe rights and deter volunteers - The Guardian
updates.body_en: US curbs on travelers exposed to deadly viruses may infringe rights and deter volunteers The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 美国对接触致命病毒旅行者的限制可能侵犯权利。

updates.title_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest - KXLY.com
updates.body_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest KXLY.com
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿州立大学研究发现美国西北部部分地区汉坦病毒高发。

updates.title_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 科学家将监测英国邮轮乘客进行汉坦病毒研究。

updates.title_en: N.Y. man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison’ - NBC News
updates.body_en: N.Y. man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison’ NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 纽约男子称内布拉斯加隔离中心像监狱。

updates.title_en: Molecular evolutionary analysis of the current MV Hondius Andes virus outbreak - Virological
updates.body_en: Molecular evolutionary analysis of the current MV Hondius Andes virus outbreak Virological
updates.summary_zh: 对当前MV Hondius安第斯病毒疫情进行分子进化分析。

updates.title_en: EU accelerates research into hantavirus vaccines - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: EU accelerates research into hantavirus vaccines Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟加速汉坦病毒疫苗研究。

updates.title_en: Residents linked to Hantavirus outbreak in Wales - here's the latest update - The Western Telegraph
updates.body_en: Residents linked to Hantavirus outbreak in Wales - here's the latest update The Western Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 威尔士汉坦病毒疫情最新进展。

updates.title_en: MEPs clash over EU hantavirus response in Covid déjà-vu - Euractiv
updates.body_en: MEPs clash over EU hantavirus response in Covid déjà-vu Euractiv
updates.summary_zh: 欧洲议会议员就欧盟汉坦病毒应对措施发生冲突。

updates.title_en: Sentara prepares for possible hantavirus infections - WAVY.com
updates.body_en: Sentara prepares for possible hantavirus infections WAVY.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国 Sentara 医院为可能的汉坦病毒感染做准备。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus, ebola outbreaks proof world isn’t yet prepared to protect all 8 bn people: WHO’s Helen Clark - Firstpost
updates.body_en: Hantavirus, ebola outbreaks proof world isn’t yet prepared to protect all 8 bn people: WHO’s Helen Clark Firstpost
updates.summary_zh: WHO 官员称汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情表明世界尚未准备好保护80亿人。
